0.title: Overview
0.text:
- Build focus: spell-heavy Sniper build
- Main idea: use Sniper kills to reduce spell cooldowns and cast huge spells constantly
- Playstyle: one-shot enemies with Sniper, use Bow to destroy ghost houses, and use big cooldown spells to wipe hordes
- Strong because it combines high weak-spot damage with very fast spell cooldown recovery

1.title: Primary Weapon: Sniper
1.text:
- Primary weapon: Long Ranger / Sniper
- Stat priority: max Damage, then put the rest into Fire Rate
- Why Fire Rate: it speeds up the bolt action, so the sniper cycles shots faster
- Key jokers: Headbang, Clutch, Focus Shot
- Headbang gives more weak-spot damage
- Clutch makes weak-spot hits explode
- Focus Shot is the most important joker: every kill reduces spell cooldowns by 1 second
- Sniper still one-shots most enemies while also helping you spam spells

2.title: Secondary Weapon: Bow
2.text:
- Secondary weapon: Bow
- Main purpose: one-shot ghost houses / soul houses
- Stat priority: Damage and Bend Speed
- If using Bow mainly for ghost houses, focus heavily on Bend Speed
- Key joker: Ultra Draw
- Ultra Draw charges a massive explosive arrow that can one-shot ghost houses
- Other jokers used: Headbang, Run and Gun, Bellshot
- Element: Fire
- Fire puddles from Bow can combo with Bubble to create fire tornadoes, though Bubble is not part of this build

3.title: Spells
3.text:
- Spells used: Thunder Strike, Rain, and Doll
- Thunder Strike: huge lightning AoE for wiping hordes
- Rain: strong acid spell that clears groups over time
- Doll: makes you invincible while inside it
- Main combo: Thunder Strike, then Doll, then Rain
- Use Doll to safely stand and deal damage or heal
- These spells have long cooldowns, but Sniper Focus Shot and Battle Mage bring them back very quickly
- In big enemy waves, you can cast multiple Thunder Strikes, Rains, and Dolls in one fight

4.title: Character
4.text:
- Main jokers: Second Wind, Soul Siphon, Glass Cannon, Battle Mage
- Second Wind is strongly recommended for solo safety
- Soul Siphon gives healing when picking up souls
- Glass Cannon gives big damage, but can be swapped if you want safer play
- Battle Mage is the key character joker: kills reduce ongoing spell cooldowns by 1%
- Battle Mage stacks with Sniper Focus Shot, giving both 1% cooldown reduction and 1 second cooldown reduction per kill
- This is what makes the build cast big spells so often

5.title: Strategy and Run Tips
5.text:
- Use Sniper to kill enemies and constantly reduce spell cooldowns
- Aim for weak spots because Headbang and Clutch reward accurate shots
- Use Bow Ultra Draw to one-shot ghost houses quickly
- Save big spells for storms, danger zones, and large enemy waves
- Combo flow: Thunder Strike into Doll, heal if needed, then cast Rain
- Use Doll offensively too: stand inside it safely while shooting or fighting bosses
- Watch out for snakes because Sniper is awkward against small ground enemies
- Use high ground to scout ghost houses, jokers, and enemy groups
- Collect gold for the Wandering Trader, but do not overextend for it
- Be careful with HP-reducing jokers; survivability matters in solo Nightmare
- During extraction, use Doll and Rain to buy time and clear enemies while waiting to leave
